title: The Mr. Rabbit Magic Show
description: The incredible Mr. Rabbit invites you all to a mysterious magic show! Celebrate 10 years of Rusty Lake with a new free-to-play point-and-click adventure that promises to delight and… shock you with its sleight of hand!

localized_description.text: The incredible Mr. Rabbit invites you all to a mysterious magic show! Celebrate 10 years of Rusty Lake with a new free-to-play point-and-click adventure that promises to delight and… shock you with its sleight of hand!

請坐，放輕鬆，準備好在《The Mr. Rabbit Magic Show》中解開謎題吧！
  這款Rusty Lake的十週年免費點擊冒險遊戲，將帶你歷經20個荒誕又怪奇的魔術橋段，處處挑戰你對「常規」的理解
  看起來不對勁？也許…它本來就不對勁  
   
  特色：   
   Rusty Lake 十週年  
  一款短篇卻充滿魔幻的免費遊戲，藏著無數祕密與意想不到的轉折，將你帶入詭異的慶祝氣氛中  
   
   不只音樂，還有更多驚喜  
  沉浸在魔幻配樂與豐富音效中，甚至還有出人意料的配音員登場
   
   換個角度 
  悄悄拉開布簾，一窺 Mr. Rabbit這位魔術師的華麗幕後！

Take a seat, get comfortable, and prepare to solve some puzzles in The Mr. Rabbit Magic Show! This anniversary free-to-play adventure from Rusty Lake will take you through 20 whimsically bizarre acts bound to test your ability to think outside the “box”. Don’t be surprised when things are not what they seem… or are they? 
  
  Features  
   10 years of Rusty Lake 
  A free to play short but magical game filled with secrets and unexpected twists that will put you in a celebratory mood 
  
   There will be music... and more 
  A magical soundtrack accompanied by rich sound effects and unexpected voice actors
  
   Take a step back 
  A chance to peek behind the curtain of the extravagant magician also known as Mr. Rabbit!

¡Toma asiento, ponte cómodo y prepárate para resolver algunos puzles en el Show Mágico del Sr. Conejo! Esta aventura gratuita que celebra el décimo aniversario de Rusty Lake te llevará por 20 actos tan extraños como fantásticos, que pondrán a prueba tu habilidad para pensar fuera de la "caja". No te sorprendas cuando las cosas no sean lo que parecen...¿O sí lo son?  
   
  Presentamos:   
   10 años de Rusty Lake  
  Un juego gratuito corto, pero mágico. Lleno de secretos y sorpresas inesperadas que te pondrán de humor celebratorio.  
   
   Habrá música...y más  
  Una banda sonora mágica, acompañada de múltiples efectos de sonido y actores de voz inesperados.
   
   
   ¿Qué hay detrás de la cortina?  
  ¡Una chance de saber más sobre el extravagante y enigmático mago conocido como Sr. Conejo!

Prends place, assieds-toi confortablement, et prépare-toi à résoudre des puzzles dans The Mr Rabbit Magic Show ! Dans cette nouvelle aventure gratuite célébrant l'anniversaire de Rusty Lake, laisse-toi guider à travers 20 actes loufoques qui mettront à l'épreuve ta capacité à penser en-dehors de la "boîte". Ne te laisse pas déstabiliser si les apparences sont trompeuses... mais le sont-elles vraiment ?
   
  Caractéristiques:   
   Pour les 10 ans de Rusty Lake  
  Un petit jeu gratuit mais rempli de magie, dont les secrets et les rebondissements te plongeront dans une atmosphère festive.
    
   
   Une ambiance sonore de qualité 
  Découvrez une composition musicale féérique accompagnée d'effets sonores variés et de doublages inattendus.
   
   Prends du recul 
  Tu auras la chance de pouvoir découvrir les coulisses du spectacle de l'extravagant magicien Mr Rabbit !

Take a seat, get comfortable, and prepare to solve some puzzles in The Mr. Rabbit Magic Show! This anniversary free-to-play adventure from Rusty Lake will take you through 20 whimsically bizarre acts bound to test your ability to think outside the “box”. Don’t be surprised when things are not what they seem… or are they? 
  
  Features  
   10 years of Rusty Lake 
  A free to play short but magical game filled with secrets and unexpected twists that will put you in a celebratory mood 
  
   There will be music... and more 
  A magical soundtrack accompanied by rich sound effects and unexpected voice actors
  
   Take a step back 
  A chance to peek behind the curtain of the extravagant magician also known as Mr. Rabbit!

Sente, relaxe e se prepare para resolver quebra-cabeças em The Mr. Rabbit Magic Show! Nesta aventura grátis de aniversário de Rusty Lake, você vai percorrer 20 atos fantásticos e bizarros que vão testar sua habilidade de pensar fora da caixa. Não fique surpreso se as coisas não forem o que parecerem... ou será que são?
   
  Características:   
   10 anos de Rusty Lake 
  Um jogo grátis curto, mas mágico, cheio de segredos e surpresas que vão te colocar no clima de comemoração 
   
   Terá música... e mais 
   
  Uma trilha sonora mágica acompanhada de efeitos sonoros exuberantes e dubladores inesperados
   
   Um passo para trás 
  Uma chance de olhar por trás da cortina do mágico extravagante conhecido como sr. Coelho!

さあ、席に着いてくつろいで、ミスター・ラビットのマジックショーでパズルを解く準備をしましょう！ラスティレイクが贈るこの10周年記念の無料アドベンチャーゲームでは、型にはまらない発想力が試される、x種類の遊び心満載の奇想天外なマジックが繰り広げられます。驚かないでください。物事は見かけどおりとは限りません... おそらくですが。
   
  特徴：   
   ラスティレイク10周年記念 
  秘密と思いがけない展開に満ちた、無料で遊べる短くも不思議なゲームで、お祝いムードを盛り上げます
   
   音楽あり... 他にも満載 
  素晴らしいサウンドトラックに加えて、豊かな効果音と意外な声優陣
   
   一歩下がって客席から観察 
  ミスター・ラビットとしても知られる華麗なマジシャンの裏側を覗くチャンスです！

Take a seat, get comfortable, and prepare to solve some puzzles in The Mr. Rabbit Magic Show! This anniversary free-to-play adventure from Rusty Lake will take you through 20 whimsically bizarre acts bound to test your ability to think outside the “box”. Don’t be surprised when things are not what they seem… or are they? 
  
  Features  
   10 years of Rusty Lake 
  A free to play short but magical game filled with secrets and unexpected twists that will put you in a celebratory mood 
  
   There will be music... and more 
  A magical soundtrack accompanied by rich sound effects and unexpected voice actors
  
   Take a step back 
  A chance to peek behind the curtain of the extravagant magician also known as Mr. Rabbit!

Tag plads, sæt dig godt til rette, og gør dig klar til at løse nogle gåder i Hr. Kanins Trylleshow! Dette gratis jubilæumsspil fra Rusty Lake vil føre dig gennem 20 finurlige og bizarre akter, som vil teste dine evner til at tænke ud af (tryllekunsterens) boks. Bliv ikke overrasket, hvis tingene ikke er, hvad de ser ud til... eller er de?
   
  Indeholder:   
   10 år med Rusty Lake 
  Et gratis, kort, men magisk spil, fyldt med hemmeligheder og uventede drejninger, som helt sikkert får dig i feststemning
   
   Der vil være musik... og meget mere 
  Et magisk soundtrack akkompagneret af lækre lydeffekter og uventede stemmeskuespillere
   
   Tag et skridt tilbage 
  En mulighed for at kigge med bag scenetæppet hos den ekstravagante tryllekunster Hr. Kanin!

Accomodatevi, mettetevi comodi e preparatevi a risolvere qualche enigma in The Mr. Rabbit Magic Show! Questa avventura gratuita per l'anniversario di Rusty Lake vi condurrà attraverso 20 atti stravaganti e bizzarri che metteranno alla prova la vostra capacità di pensare fuori dagli schemi. Non sorprendetevi se le cose non sono come sembrano... o lo sono?
    
   
  Caratteristiche principali:   
   10 anni di Rusty Lake  
  Un gioco gratuito breve ma magico, pieno di segreti e colpi di scena inaspettati che vi metteranno in vena di festeggiamenti.
    
   
   Ci sarà musica... e non solo  
  Una colonna sonora magica accompagnata da ricchi effetti sonori e doppiatori inaspettati
   
   
   Fai un passo indietro 
   
  Un'occasione per sbirciare dietro le quinte dello stravagante mago noto anche come Mr. Rabbit!

brief: The incredible Mr. Rabbit invites you all to a mysterious magic show! Celebrate 10 years of Rusty Lake with a new free-to-play point-and-click adventure that promises to delight and… shock you with its sleight of hand!

title: Half-Life: Alyx
description:
Half-Life: Alyx is Valve’s VR return to the Half-Life series. It’s the story of an impossible fight against a vicious alien race known as the Combine, set between the events of Half-Life and Half-Life 2. Alyx Vance and her father Eli mount an early resistance to the Combine's brutal occupation of Earth.

Playing as Alyx Vance, you are humanity’s only chance for survival. The Combine’s control of the planet since the Black Mesa incident has only strengthened as they corral the remaining population in cities. Among them are some of Earth’s greatest scientists: you and your father, Dr. Eli Vance.

As founders of a fledgling resistance, you’ve continued your clandestine scientific activity—performing critical research, and building invaluable tools for the few humans brave enough to defy the Combine.

Every day, you learn more about your enemy, and every day you work toward finding a weakness.

localized_description.text:
Half-Life: Alyx is Valve’s VR return to the Half-Life series. It’s the story of an impossible fight against a vicious alien race known as the Combine, set between the events of Half-Life and Half-Life 2. Alyx Vance and her father Eli mount an early resistance to the Combine's brutal occupation of Earth.

Playing as Alyx Vance, you are humanity’s only chance for survival. The Combine’s control of the planet since the Black Mesa incident has only strengthened as they corral the remaining population in cities. Among them are some of Earth’s greatest scientists: you and your father, Dr. Eli Vance.

As founders of a fledgling resistance, you’ve continued your clandestine scientific activity—performing critical research, and building invaluable tools for the few humans brave enough to defy the Combine.

Every day, you learn more about your enemy, and every day you work toward finding a weakness.

Half-Life: Alyx is Valve’s VR return to the Half-Life series. It’s the story of an impossible fight against a vicious alien race known as the Combine, set between the events of Half-Life and Half-Life 2.  
 
 Playing as Alyx Vance, you are humanity’s only chance for survival. The Combine’s control of the planet since the Black Mesa incident has only strengthened as they corral the remaining population in cities.  Among them are some of Earth’s greatest scientists: you and your father, Dr. Eli Vance. 
 
 As founders of a fledgling resistance, you’ve continued your clandestine scientific activity—performing critical research, and building invaluable tools for the few humans brave enough to defy the Combine.  
 
 Every day, you learn more about your enemy, and every day you work toward finding a weakness. 
 
  ABOUT GAMEPLAY IN VR:  
 
 Valve’s return to the Half-Life universe that started it all was built from the ground up for virtual reality. VR was built to enable the gameplay that sits at the heart of Half-Life. 
 
 Immerse yourself in deep environmental interactions, puzzle solving, world exploration, and visceral combat.  
 
 Lean to aim around a broken wall and under a Barnacle to make an impossible shot. Rummage through shelves to find a healing syringe and some shotgun shells. Manipulate tools to hack alien interfaces. Toss a bottle through a window to distract an enemy. Rip a Headcrab off your face and throw it out the window.
 
  COMMUNITY-BUILT ENVIRONMENTS 
 
 A set of Source 2 tools for building new levels is included with the game, enabling any player to build and contribute new environments for the community to enjoy through Half-Life: Alyx's Steam Workshop. Hammer, Valve’s level authoring tool, has been updated with all of the game's virtual reality gameplay tools and components.

﻿Half-Life: Alyx es el regreso de Valve en realidad virtual a la serie Half-Life. Es la historia de una lucha imposible contra una cruel raza alienígena conocida como la Alianza que se desarrolla entre los acontecimientos de Half-Life y Half-Life 2.
 
 Jugando como Alyx Vance, eres la única oportunidad de supervivencia de la humanidad. El control de la Alianza sobre el planeta desde el incidente de Black Mesa solo se ha fortalecido a medida que acorralan a los habitantes que quedan en las ciudades. Entre ellos se encuentran algunos de los mejores científicos de la Tierra: tú y tu padre, el Dr. Eli Vance.
 
 Como fundadores de una resistencia incipiente, habéis continuado vuestra actividad científica clandestina, realizando investigaciones críticas y construyendo herramientas invaluables para los pocos humanos lo suficientemente valientes como para desafiar a la Alianza.
 
 Todos los días, aprendes más sobre tu enemigo, y cada día trabajas para encontrar su punto débil.
 
  SOBRE LA FORMA DE JUGAR EN RV:  
 
 El regreso de Valve al universo de Half-Life, la serie que lo empezó todo, se hizo desde cero para la realidad virtual. La realidad virtual se creó para permitir una jugabilidad que se encuentra en el corazón de Half-Life.
 
 Sumérgete en profundas interacciones ambientales, resolución de rompecabezas, exploración del mundo y combate visceral.
 
 Apóyate sobre una pared rota y debajo de una lapa para realizar un disparo imposible. Rebusca entre los estantes para encontrar una jeringa curativa y algunos cartuchos de escopeta. Manipula herramientas para hackear las interfaces alienígenas. Lanza una botella por una ventana para distraer a un enemigo. Quítate un cangrejo de la cabeza y tíralo por la ventana.
 
  Entornos creados por la comunidad 
 
 Un conjunto de herramientas de Source 2 para construir nuevos niveles, lo que permite a cualquier jugador construir y contribuir con nuevos entornos para que la comunidad disfrute a través del Workshop de Steam para Half-Life: Alyx. Hammer, la herramienta de creación de niveles de Valve, se ha actualizado con todas las herramientas y componentes de jugabilidad de realidad virtual en el juego.

Half-Life: Alyx marque le retour, en VR, de Valve dans l'univers de Half-Life. Situé entre les événements de Half-Life et de Half-Life 2, le jeu retrace l'histoire d'un combat impossible contre un groupe d'extraterrestres cruels connu sous le nom du Cartel.
 
 Vous incarnez Alyx Vance et vous êtes la dernière chance de survie de l'humanité. Depuis l'incident de Black Mesa, le contrôle de la planète par le Cartel n'a fait que se durcir, alors que le reste de la population est parqué dans les cités. Parmi eux vivent deux des plus grands scientifiques de la Terre : votre père, le docteur Eli Vance, et vous.
 
 En tant que fondateurs de la résistance naissante, vous avez poursuivi dans la clandestinité votre activité scientifique de recherche sur des points critiques et créé des outils précieux pour les quelques humains assez courageux pour défier le Cartel.
 
 Chaque jour, vous en apprenez plus sur votre ennemi et cherchez à découvrir son point faible.
 
  À PROPOS DE L'EXPÉRIENCE DE JEU EN VR : 
 
 Pour son retour à l'univers de Half-Life qui a marqué le début de son histoire, Valve a construit une expérience axée sur la réalité virtuelle. La VR était idéale pour le type de gameplay qui fait le cœur de Half-Life.
 
 Immergez-vous dans les interactions intenses avec l'environnement, la résolution d'énigmes, l'exploration du monde et les combats sanglants.
 
 Cachez-vous derrière un pan de mur sous un barnacle pour viser et effectuer un tir impossible. Fouillez des étagères pour trouver de quoi vous soigner ou de quoi recharger votre arme. Utilisez vos outils pour pirater les interfaces extraterrestres. Lancez une bouteille par la fenêtre pour faire diversion. Débarrassez-vous d'un crabe de tête accroché à votre visage et jetez-le par la fenêtre.
 
  Des environnements créés par la communauté 
 
 Le jeu inclut un ensemble d'outils Source 2 pour créer de nouveaux niveaux. Ainsi, les joueurs et joueuses peuvent créer de nouveaux environnements pour toute la communauté, ou contribuer à leur création, depuis le Workshop de Half-Life: Alyx sur Steam. Hammer, l'éditeur de niveaux de Valve, a été enrichi avec tous les outils et composants de gameplay du jeu spécifiques à la réalité virtuelle.

﻿Valve kehrt mit seinem neuen VR-Spiel Half-Life: Alyx zu Half-Life zurück. Zeitlich zwischen den Ereignissen von Half-Life und Half-Life 2 gelegen, handelt die Geschichte von einem unmöglichen Kampf gegen außerirdische Eroberer – die Combine.
 
 Sie sind Alyx Vance – die einzige Hoffnung für das Überleben der Menschheit. Seit dem Black-Mesa-Vorfall hat die Combine ihre Vorherrschaft über den Planeten noch weiter ausgebaut und pfercht die übriggebliebene Bevölkerung in Städte ein. Unter ihnen befinden sich zwei der größten Wissenschaftler der Erde: Ihr Vater, Dr. Eli Vance und Sie.
 
 Als Gründer des aufkeimenden Widerstands haben Sie Ihre wissenschaftlichen Aktivitäten heimlich fortgeführt – wichtige Forschungen und die Herstellung wertvoller Werkzeuge für die wenigen Menschen, die es wagen, sich der Combine zu widersetzen.
 
 Mit jedem Tag, der vergeht, lernen Sie mehr über Ihren Feind und seine Schwächen.
 
  ZUM VR-GAMEPLAY: 
 
 Es begann mit Half-Life. Nun kehrt Valve zum Half-Life-Universum mit einem Spiel zurück, das von Grund auf für VR geschaffen wurde. VR ist wie für das Herz des Half-Life-Gameplays geschaffen.
 
 Erleben Sie vollkommene Immersion bei Ihrer Interaktion mit der Umgebung, der Lösung von Puzzles, der Erkundung der Welt und realistischen Kämpfen.
 
 Spähen Sie hinter einer zerbröckelten Mauer oder unter einer Klette hervor, um einen (scheinbar) unmöglichen Treffer zu landen. Stöbern Sie in Regalen nach Spritzen mit Heilserum und Munition. Bearbeiten Sie Werkzeuge, die alle außerirdischen Geräte hacken. Werfen Sie eine Flasche durch ein Fenster und lenken damit den Feind ab. Reißen Sie sich Kopfkrabben vom Gesicht und schmeißen Sie sie aus dem Fenster.
 
  Community-erstellte Umgebungen 
 
 Im Spiel inbegriffen ist ein Satz an Werkzeugen für Source 2 zur Erstellung neuer Level, mit denen Spieler nach Herzenslust neue Umgebungen für die Community über den Steam Workshop für Half-Life: Alyx erstellen können. Valves Leveleditor „Hammer“ wurde mit allen VR-Gameplay-Werkzeugen und -Komponenten aktualisiert.

﻿Half-Life: Alyx é o regresso em realidade virtual da Valve à série Half-Life. Trata-se da história de uma luta impossível contra uma raça alienígena cruel chamada Combine, situada entre os eventos de Half-Life e Half-Life 2.
 
 Neste jogo assumes o papel de Alyx Vance e és a única chance de sobrevivência da humanidade. O controlo exercido pelos Combine sobre o planeta desde o incidente de Black Mesa cresce cada vez mais à medida que aprisionam o resto da população em cidades. Entre os sobreviventes, estão alguns dos maiores cientistas da Terra: tu e o teu pai, o Dr. Eli Vance.
 
 Como fundadores de uma nova resistência, vocês continuaram as vossas atividades científicas clandestinas, realizando pesquisas cruciais e construindo ferramentas valiosas para os poucos humanos suficientemente corajosos e capazes de desafiar os Combine.
 
 Todos os dias, aprendes mais sobre o teu inimigo e trabalhas arduamente para descobrir um ponto fraco.
 
  SOBRE A JOGABILIDADE EM R.V.:  
 
 O projeto que marca o regresso da Valve ao universo do Half-life, que foi o ponto de partida disto tudo, foi desenvolvido a partir do zero para a realidade virtual. A R.V. foi criada para possibilitar a jogabilidade que define a essência do Half-Life.
 
 Envolve-te em profundas interações ambientais, quebra-cabeças para resolver, um mundo para explorar e combates viscerais.
 
 Espreita por uma parede destruída e debaixo de um Barnacle para dares aquele tiro impossível. Vasculha por prateleiras para encontrares uma seringa curativa ou cartuchos para a caçadeira. Manipula ferramentas para hackeares interfaces alienígenas. Atira uma garrafa por uma janela para distraíres um inimigo. Arranca um headcrab da tua cara e atira-o pela janela.
 
  Ambientes criados pela comunidade 
 
 Um conjunto de ferramentas do Source 2 está disponível para o jogo, permitindo a qualquer jogador criar e partilhar novos ambientes com a comunidade através do Workshop do Half-Life: Alyx. O Hammer, a ferramenta de criação de mapas da Valve, foi atualizado com todos os componentes e ferramentas de jogabilidade de realidade virtual do jogo.

Half-Life: Alyx er Valves tilbagevenden til Half-Life-serien i VR. Det er historien om en umulig kamp mod en ondsindet alienrace kendt som Combine, der foregår mellem begivenhederne i Half-Life og Half-Life 2.
 
 Du er Alyx Vance, menneskehedens eneste chance for at overleve. Combines kontrol over planeten siden hændelsen ved Black Mesa er kun blevet forstærket, efter de er begyndt at indhegne de tilbageværende mennesker i byerne. Blandt dem er der nogle af verdens førende forskere: dig og din far, Dr. Eli Vance.
 
 Som grundlæggere af en ny modstandsgruppe har I fortsat jeres hemmelige forskningsaktiviteter og udført kritisk research, der har resulteret i uvurderlige værktøjer til de få mennesker, der er modige nok til at trodse Combine.
 
 Hver dag lærer I mere om jeres fjende, og hver dag prøver I at finde dens svagheder.
 
  OM GAMEPLAY I VR:  
 
 Valves tilbagevenden til Half-Life-universet, der startede det hele, blev bygget fra bunden af til virtual reality. VR blev bygget til at muliggøre gameplayet, der er Half-Lifes hjerteblod.
 
 Bliv opslugt i en verden, hvor du kan udforske og påvirke et interaktivt miljø, løse puzzles og deltage i blodige kampe.
 
 Læn dig for at sigte uden om en ødelagt væg og under en barnacle for at foretage et vovet skud. Gennemrod hylder for at finde helingssprøjter og haglpatroner. Manipuler værktøjer til at hacke aliengrænseflader. Kast en flaske igennem et vindue for at distrahere en fjende. Riv en headcrab af dit ansigt, og kast den ud af vinduet.
 
  Fællesskabsskabte miljøer 
 
 Et sæt af Source 2-værktøjer til at bygge nye baner leveres sammen med spillet og giver alle spillere mulighed for at lave og bidrage med nye miljøer, som fællesskabet kan more sig med via Steam-værkstedet til Half-Life: Alyx. Hammer, Valves bane-authoringsværktøj, er blevet opdateret med alle spillets værktøjer og komponenter til at skabe virtual reality-gameplay.

Half-Life: Alyx è il ritorno in VR di Valve alla serie Half-Life. La storia, ambientata tra gli eventi di Half-Life e Half-Life 2, è quella della lotta impossibile contro una feroce razza aliena nota con il nome di Combine.
 
 Impersoni Alyx Vance e sei l'unica possibilità per l'umanità di sopravvivere. Il controllo dei Combine sul pianeta dopo l'incidente di Black Mesa si è fatto ancora più asfissiante e la popolazione rimasta viene forzata a vivere nelle città. Tra di loro ci sono due tra i migliori scienziati della Terra: tu e tuo padre, il dottor Eli Vance.
 
 Come fondatori di una nuova resistenza, avete continuato in maniera clandestina la vostra attività scientifica, effettuando importantissime ricerche e sviluppando strumenti indispensabili per i pochi umani abbastanza coraggiosi da sfidare i Combine.
 
 Ogni giorno imparate di più sui vostri nemici e ogni giorno cercate di individuare le loro debolezze.
 
  INFORMAZIONI SUL GAMEPLAY IN VR:  
 
 Il ritorno di Valve nell'universo di Half-Life, da cui tutto ha avuto inizio, è stato costruito da zero per la realtà virtuale. La realtà virtuale è stata creata per consentire il gameplay che rappresenta il cuore di Half-Life.
 
 Immergiti in ambientazioni profonde, rompicapo, esplorazione del mondo e combattimento viscerale.
 
 Sporgiti da un muro diroccato o da sotto un cirripede per mettere a segno un colpo impossibile. Rovista tra gli scaffali per trovare una siringa curativa e dei proiettili per il fucile a pompa. Manipola strumenti e usa le tue capacità da hacker per infiltrati nelle interfacce aliene. Lancia una bottiglia da una finestra per distrarre un nemico. Strappati un succhiateste di dosso e scaraventalo dalla finestra.
 
  Ambienti creati dalla Comunità 
 
 Il gioco include una serie di strumenti Source 2 per la creazione di nuovi livelli, che consentono ai giocatori di creare e contribuire ai nuovi ambienti per la Comunità tramite il Workshop di Steam di Half-Life: Alyx. Hammer, lo strumento di Valve per la creazione di livelli, è stato aggiornato con tutte le componenti e gli strumenti relativi al gameplay in realtà virtuale.

brief:
Half-Life: Alyx is Valve’s VR return to the Half-Life series. It’s the story of an impossible fight against a vicious alien race known as the Combine, set between the events of Half-Life and Half-Life 2. Alyx Vance and her father Eli mount an early resistance to the Combine's brutal occupation of Earth.

Playing as Alyx Vance, you are humanity’s only chance for survival. The Combine’s control of the planet since the Black Mesa incident has only strengthened as they corral the remaining population in cities. Among them are some of Earth’s greatest scientists: you and your father, Dr. Eli Vance.

As founders of a fledgling resistance, you’ve continued your clandestine scientific activity—performing critical research, and building invaluable tools for the few humans brave enough to defy the Combine.

Every day, you learn more about your enemy, and every day you work toward finding a weakness.

title: The Last Caretaker
description:
A first-person survival action-adventure where you sail, scavenge, and rebuild in an endless ocean world. Recover lost technology, craft vital systems, and ensure humanity’s future—before it’s too late.
  
  You are the Last Caretaker, a lone machine reawakened after centuries of silence. The Earth is flooded, its towering megastructures rusting under an endless sky. The Seed Vaults remain, containing the last human seeds—waiting to be born. Your mission is clear: recover the seeds, reactivate the Lazarus Complex, and launch the last of humanity to the stars.
  
  But the world is not as empty as it seems. Machines still whisper old protocols, relics of the past still move with purpose, and your every step brings you closer to uncovering the meaning of your existence.
  
  NURTURE HUMANS   
  Care for and grow human seeds within the Lazarus Complex, managing crucial systems like incubation temperature, nutrient flow, and memory data integration. Unlock advanced biopods and synthetic caretakers to accelerate development and ensure successful revival. Discover emotional imprints and past memories encoded in each seed, piecing together lost human stories as you bring life back into the world.
  
  PROTECT HUMANS   
  Defend the Lazarus Complex from rogue machines and environmental threats. Build automated defenses, upgrade your mobile platform, and deploy countermeasures during storms and system breaches. Safeguard the vulnerable human seeds and ensure the sanctuary remains operational while under siege. Strategic choices in protection systems can determine the fate of the last generation of humans.
  
  LAUNCH ROCKETS INTO ORBIT   
  Restore and reactivate the ancient MOSES launch infrastructure to send reborn humans beyond the drowning world. Scavenge for launch codes, refine fuel, and rebuild navigation AI systems to ensure mission success. Each launch is a calculated risk—but a necessary one to preserve the species. Watch your nurtured humans ascend into orbit, carrying with them the hopes of a renewed humanity.

localized_description.text:
在无尽的海洋世界中航行、搜寻、重建，这是一款第一人称生存动作冒险游戏。找回失落的科技，锻造关键系统，全力守护人类未来——趁希望尚存。
  您是 The Last Caretaker，一台在沉寂数个世纪后重启的孤独机械。地球早已被无尽汪洋吞没，曾经巍然耸立的巨型结构，在漫长岁月中锈蚀崩塌。而种子存储库仍然屹立，其间封存着人类最后的种子——静候新生。您的使命已然明确：寻回种子，重启 Lazarus Complex，并将人类最后的希望送往星辰大海。
  然而，这个世界远非表面般空寂。机器仍在低语旧日法则，昔日遗迹依旧承载未竟的使命，而您的每一步，皆让您离揭开自身存在的真相更近一步。
   探索   乘风破浪，驶向广袤无垠的开放海洋，穿梭于被遗忘的文明残骸之间。从巍峨矗立的巨型结构与闪烁不定的信标，再到荒废已久的种子存储库与燃料站，每一处遗迹皆承载着失落的知识、珍贵的资源，以及隐藏在时间深处的未解之谜。
   创建   搜寻并修复远古科技，打造模块化升级，重启关键系统，以重建 MOSES 基础设施。从复苏能源网络到重构发射系统，每一项创新都将使人类离生存更进一步。
   培育   Lazarus Complex 是人类最后的庇护所。您需精心监测并优化人类种子的孕育过程，在能量供给、营养调配与记忆重塑之间维持微妙平衡。每一次向星辰的发射，都是人类迈向超越海洋未来的关键一步。
   生存   海洋虽美，却危机四伏。叛变的机械、肆虐的风暴、稀缺的资源，每一步都充满挑战。适应环境，升级装备，奋力战斗，守护这片残存的希望。
   探索   您虽非人类，却肩负着人类的未来。成为人类究竟意味着什么？生命是否能在冰冷的合成之手中重获新生？踏上探索之旅，揭开地球最后的篇章，探寻自身存在的终极真相。

這是一款第一人稱生存動作冒險遊戲，你將在無盡的海洋世界中航行、搜刮並重建。回收失落的科技，打造維生系統，確保人類未來不會為時已晚。
  
  你是 the Last Caretaker，是在數個世紀沉寂後重新活動的孤獨機器。地球已被水淹沒，昔日高聳的巨型建築在無盡的天空下漸漸生鏽。種子庫依然存在，保存著最後的人類種子——靜待重生。你的使命明確：回收種子，重新啟動 Lazarus Complex，並將最後的人類血脈送向外太空。
  然而，這世界並非表面上那般空洞。機器依舊維持著固有的運作方式，過去的遺跡仍懷著使命前行，而你每一步都將讓你更了解自身存在的意義。
   探索   在廣闊的開放世界海洋中航行，穿越已被遺忘文明的遺跡。從高聳的巨型建築與閃爍的燈塔，到廢棄的種子庫與燃料站，每一個地點皆蘊藏著失落的知識、珍貴的資源以及等待揭曉的謎團。
   創造   搜尋並修復古代技術、製作模組升級，並重新啟維生鍵系統以重建 MOSES 設施。每項技術創新都會更接近人類重生，從恢復電網到重建發射系統。
   培育   Lazarus Complex 是最後的人類庇護所。監控並優化人類種子生長的精密結構，平衡能量、營養與記憶重建。每一次外太空之旅都讓人類更接近超越海洋的未來。
   生存   海洋美麗——但不安全。叛變的機械、變幻莫測的風暴以及有限的資源，時時刻刻在都挑戰你的使命。適應、升級，全力以赴保護僅存的一切。
   探索   你雖非人類，卻掌握著他們的未來。身為人類意味著什麼？生命能否藉由合成之手重獲新生？在你探索之時，將揭示地球的最後日子——以及你存在的背後真相。

A first-person survival action-adventure where you sail, scavenge, and rebuild in an endless ocean world. Recover lost technology, craft vital systems, and ensure humanity’s future—before it’s too late.
  
  You are the Last Caretaker, a lone machine reawakened after centuries of silence. The Earth is flooded, its towering megastructures rusting under an endless sky. The Seed Vaults remain, containing the last human seeds—waiting to be born. Your mission is clear: recover the seeds, reactivate the Lazarus Complex, and launch the last of humanity to the stars.
  
  But the world is not as empty as it seems. Machines still whisper old protocols, relics of the past still move with purpose, and your every step brings you closer to uncovering the meaning of your existence.
  
  NURTURE HUMANS   
  Care for and grow human seeds within the Lazarus Complex, managing crucial systems like incubation temperature, nutrient flow, and memory data integration. Unlock advanced biopods and synthetic caretakers to accelerate development and ensure successful revival. Discover emotional imprints and past memories encoded in each seed, piecing together lost human stories as you bring life back into the world.
  
  PROTECT HUMANS   
  Defend the Lazarus Complex from rogue machines and environmental threats. Build automated defenses, upgrade your mobile platform, and deploy countermeasures during storms and system breaches. Safeguard the vulnerable human seeds and ensure the sanctuary remains operational while under siege. Strategic choices in protection systems can determine the fate of the last generation of humans.
  
  LAUNCH ROCKETS INTO ORBIT   
  Restore and reactivate the ancient MOSES launch infrastructure to send reborn humans beyond the drowning world. Scavenge for launch codes, refine fuel, and rebuild navigation AI systems to ensure mission success. Each launch is a calculated risk—but a necessary one to preserve the species. Watch your nurtured humans ascend into orbit, carrying with them the hopes of a renewed humanity.

Una aventura de acción y supervivencia en primera persona en la que podrás navegar, reconstruir y buscar recursos en medio de un mundo oceánico sin fin. Recupera tecnología perdida, crea sistemas vitales y salva el futuro de la humanidad antes de que sea demasiado tarde.
  En The Last Caretaker, eres una máquina solitaria reactivada tras siglos de silencio. La Tierra está inundada, y sus imponentes megaestructuras se oxidan bajo un cielo infinito. Las Cámaras de Semillas aún existen, y contienen las últimas semillas humanas que esperan su momento de nacer. Tu misión está clara: debes recuperar las semillas, reactivar el Lazarus Complex y enviar lo que queda de la humanidad a las estrellas.
  
  Pero el mundo no está tan vacío como parece: las máquinas aún susurran antiguos protocolos y hay reliquias del pasado que aún conservan su propósito original. Cada paso que des te acercará un poco más al verdadero significado de tu existencia.
  Explora  Navega por un vasto océano de mundo abierto y adéntrate en los restos de una civilización olvidada. Desde las imponentes megaestructuras y las centelleantes balizas hasta las Cámaras de Semillas y estaciones de repostaje abandonadas, cada una de las ubicaciones alberga conocimientos perdidos, recursos vitales y piezas de un misterio a la espera de resolverse.
  Crea  Recoge y restaura tecnología antigua, crea mejoras modulares y reactiva sistemas vitales para reconstruir la infraestructura MOSES. Con cada innovación, como la reactivación del suminitro eléctrico o la reconstrucción de los sistemas de lanzamiento, acercas un poco más a la humanidad a su supervivencia.
  Nutre  El Lazarus Complex es el último santuario humano. Debes supervisar y optimizar el delicado proceso de crecimiento de la semilla humana y, para ello, tendrás que encontrar el equilibrio perfecto entre poder, nutrición y reconstrucción de la memoria. Con cada lanzamiento a las estrellas, la humanidad estará un paso más cerca de hallar un futuro al otro lado del océano.
  Sobrevive  El océano es bello pero peligroso. Las máquinas rebeldes, las tormentas despiadadas y la escasez de recursos entorpecen constantemente tu misión. Adáptate, mejora y lucha para proteger lo poco que queda.
  Descubre  No perteneces a la raza humana, pero tienes su futuro en tus manos. ¿Qué significa ser humano? ¿Puede renacer vida a partir de manos sintéticas? Mientras exploras, descubrirás los últimos días de la Tierra y la verdad sobre tu existencia.

Un jeu d'action-aventure de survie à la première personne où vous naviguez, fouillez et reconstruisez dans un monde océanique infini. Récupérez la technologie perdue, fabriquez des systèmes vitaux et garantissez l'avenir de l'humanité, avant qu'il ne soit trop tard.
  
  Vous êtes the Last Caretaker, une machine solitaire réactivée après des siècles de silence. La Terre est inondée, ses imposantes mégastructures rouillant sous un ciel sans fin. Les Chambres de germination subsistent, contenant les dernières graines humaines, attendant de naître. Votre mission est claire : récupérer les graines, réactiver le Lazarus Complex et propulser le reste de l'humanité vers les étoiles.
  
  Mais le monde n'est pas aussi vide qu'il n'y paraît. Les machines continuent de murmurer d'anciens protocoles, les reliques du passé continuent de bouger avec détermination, et chaque pas que vous faites vous rapproche de la découverte du sens de votre existence.
   Explorez   Naviguez à travers un vaste océan en monde ouvert, en traversant les vestiges d'une civilisation oubliée. Des mégastructures imposantes et des balises vacillantes aux Chambres de germination abandonnées et aux stations de ravitaillement, chaque lieu cache un savoir perdu, des ressources précieuses et des fragments d'une énigme prête à être révélée.
   Créez   Récupérez et restaurez d'anciennes technologies, élaborez des améliorations modulaires et réactivez des systèmes vitaux pour reconstruire l'infrastructure MOSES. Chaque innovation rapproche l'humanité de la survie, qu'il s'agisse de relancer des réseaux électriques ou de reconstruire des systèmes de lancement
   Nourrissez   Le Lazarus Complex est le dernier sanctuaire humain. Surveillez et optimisez le processus délicat de croissance des graines humaines, en équilibrant puissance, nutrition et reconstruction de la mémoire. Chaque lancement vers les étoiles rapproche l'humanité d'un avenir au-delà de l'océan.
   Survivez   L'océan est magnifique, mais il n'est pas sûr. Des machines détraquées, des tempêtes violentes et des ressources limitées mettent votre mission en péril à chaque instant. Adaptez-vous, améliorez-vous et luttez pour protéger ce qui reste.
   Découvrir   Vous n'êtes pas humain, cependant vous détenez leur avenir entre vos mains. Que signifie être humain? La vie peut-elle renaître grâce à des mains synthétiques? Au fur et à mesure de votre exploration, vous découvrirez les derniers jours de la Terre—et la vérité sur votre existence.

Ein Survival-Action-Adventure aus der Ich-Perspektive, in dem du in einer endlosen Ozeanwelt segeln, erkunden und wiederaufbauen kannst. Berge verlorengegangene Technologien, fertige lebenswichtige Systeme an und sichere die Zukunft der Menschheit – bevor es dafür zu spät ist.
  
  Du bist der Last Caretaker, eine einsame Maschine, die nach Jahrhunderten der Stille wiedererwacht ist. Die Erde ist überflutet und ihre imposanten Megastrukturen verrosten unter einem endlosen Himmel. Die Saatkammern bestehen fort und enthalten die letzten menschlichen Samen – die darauf warten, geboren zu werden. Deine Mission ist eindeutig: Berge die Samen, reaktiviere den Lazarus Complex und schicke den letzten Teil der Menschheit zu den Sternen.
  
  Aber die Welt ist nicht so leer, wie sie scheinen mag. Immer noch flüstern Maschinen die alten Protokolle, Relikte der Vergangenheit bewegen sich nach wie vor zielgerichtet durch die Welt, und jeder Schritt bringt dich der Entdeckung des Sinns deiner Existenz wieder ein bisschen näher.
  Erkunden  Segle über einen weiten, offenen Ozean und steuere durch die Überreste einer vergessenen Zivilisation. Von hoch aufragenden Megastrukturen und flackernden Leuchtfeuern bis hin zu verlassenen Saatkammern und Tankstellen birgt jeder Ort verlorenes Wissen, lebenswichtige Ressourcen und Fragmente eines Geheimnisses, das nur darauf wartet, enthüllt zu werden.
  Erstellen  Plündere und restauriere antike Technologien, fertige modulare Upgrades an und reaktiviere wesentliche Systeme, um die MOSES-Infrastruktur wieder aufzubauen. Jede Neuerung bringt die Menschheit dem Überleben näher, von der Wiederbelebung von Stromnetzen bis zur Rekonstruktion von Startsystemen.
  Pflege  Der Lazarus Complex ist das letzte menschliche Heiligtum. Überwache und optimiere den empfindlichen Prozess des Wachstums menschlicher Samen, indem du Kraft, Ernährung und die Gedächtnisrekonstruktion in Einklang bringst. Jeder Start zu den Sternen bringt die Menschheit wieder einen Schritt näher an eine Zukunft, die sich jenseits des Ozeans befindet.
  Überleben  Der Ozean ist schön – aber kein sicherer Ort. Abtrünnige Maschinen, brutale Stürme und begrenzte Ressourcen bringen deine Mission bei jeder Wendung aufs Neue ins Wanken.
  Passe dich an, rüste auf und kämpfe, um das Wenige zu schützen, das noch übrig ist.
  Entdecken  Du bist kein Mensch, doch du hältst deren Zukunft in deinen Händen. Was bedeutet es, menschlich zu sein? Kann das Leben durch synthetische Hände wiedergeboren werden? Auf deinen Erkundungen wirst du die letzten Tage der Erde aufdecken – und auch die Wahrheit über deine Existenz.

Um jogo de ação-aventura de sobrevivência em primeira pessoa, onde você navega, recolhe recursos e reconstrói num mundo oceânico interminável. Recupere tecnologia perdida, crie sistemas vitais e garanta o futuro da humanidade—antes que seja demasiado tarde.
  
  Você é the Last Caretaker, uma máquina solitária reativada após séculos de silêncio. A Terra está inundada, as suas imponentes megastruturas a enferrujar sob um céu interminável. Os Cofres de Sementes permanecem, contendo as últimas sementes humanas—à espera de nascer. A sua missão é clara: recuperar as sementes, reativar o Lazarus Complex e lançar os últimos vestígios da humanidade para as estrelas.
  Mas o mundo não está tão vazio como parece. As máquinas ainda sussurram antigos protocolos, relíquias do passado continuam a mover-se com um propósito, e cada passo que dá aproxima-o da descoberta do verdadeiro significado da sua existência.
  Explore  Navegue por um vasto oceano de mundo aberto, navegando pelos vestígios de uma civilização esquecida. Desde imponentes megastruturas e balizas de navegação intermitentes, a cofres de sementes abandonados e postos de combustível, cada local alberga conhecimentos perdidos, recursos vitais e fragmentos de um mistério à espera de serem desvelados.
  Crie  Recupere e restaure tecnologia antiga, crie atualizações modulares e reative sistemas vitais para reconstruir a infraestrutura MOSES. Cada inovação aproxima a humanidade da sobrevivência, desde o reativamento das redes de energia, até à reconstrução de sistemas de lançamento.
  Nutra  O Lazarus Complex é o último santuário humano. Monitorize e otimize o delicado processo de crescimento da semente humana, equilibrando o poder, a nutrição e a reconstrução da memória. Cada lançamento para as estrelas aproxima a humanidade um passo mais de um futuro além do oceano.
  Sobreviva  O oceano é belo — mas não é seguro. Máquinas rebeldes, tempestades brutais e recursos limitados desafiam a sua missão a cada passo. Adapte, atualize e lute para proteger o pouco que resta.
  Descubra  Você não é humano, contudo tem o futuro deles nas suas mãos. O que significa ser humano? Pode a vida renascer através de mãos sintéticas? Ao explorar, descobrirá os últimos dias da Terra—e a verdade por trás da sua existência.

一人称視点のサバイバルアクションアドベンチャーで、果てしない海の世界を舞台に帆走し、資源を発掘し、再建を行います。失われた技術を回収し、重要なシステムを構築し、手遅れになる前に人類の未来を確かなものとしてください。
  あなたはthe Last Caretakerです。数世紀の沈黙の後に再起動された孤高の機械として、行動を開始します。地球は浸水し、果てしない空の下でそびえ立つ巨大構造物は錆に覆われています。種子貯蔵庫には、最後の人間の種が収められており、再び命を吹き込まれるのを待ち受けています。あなたの使命は明白です。種を回収し、Lazarus Complexを再起動し、人類最後の希望を星々へと導いてください。
  しかし、世界は見かけほど空虚ではありません。機械は今も古いプロトコルを語り、過去の遺物はなおも目的をもって動いており、あなたの歩みは自身の存在の意味を解明する手がかりへと着実に近づいています。
   探索 
  広大なオープンワールドの海を航海し、忘れ去られた文明の遺構を巡りましょう。
  そびえ立つメガストラクチャーや瞬くビーコンから、放棄された種子貯蔵庫や燃料ステーションに至るまで、あらゆる場所には失われた知識、重要な資源、そして明らかにされるのを待つ謎の断片が秘められています
  
   作成 
  古代のテクノロジーを探索し修復し、モジュラーアップグレードを製作し、重要なシステムを再起動してMOSESインフラを再構築しましょう。各革新は、発電網の復活から打ち上げシステムの再建に至るまで、人類を生存に一層近づけるものとなります
   育成 
  Lazarus Complexは最後の人類の聖域です。
  力、栄養、及び記憶再構築のバランスを保ちながら、人類の種の成長という繊細なプロセスを監視し、最適化しましょう。星々へのあらゆる打ち上げが、人類を海の向こう側にある未来へと一歩近づけます。
   生き延びなさい 
  海は美しい―しかし、安全ではない
  暴走機械、過酷な嵐、そして限られた資源が、あらゆる局面であなたの任務に挑戦してくる。残りわずかなものを守るため、適応し、アップグレードし、そして戦いなさい。
   発見 
  あなたは人間ではありませんが、彼らの未来はあなたの手の中にあります。人間であるということは、一体何を意味するのでしょうか？人工の手によって生命は再び蘇るのでしょうか？探索を進めるにつれて、地球の最後の日々―そして、あなたの存在の背後にある真実が明らかになるでしょう。

A first-person survival action-adventure where you sail, scavenge, and rebuild in an endless ocean world. Recover lost technology, craft vital systems, and ensure humanity’s future—before it’s too late.
  
  You are the Last Caretaker, a lone machine reawakened after centuries of silence. The Earth is flooded, its towering megastructures rusting under an endless sky. The Seed Vaults remain, containing the last human seeds—waiting to be born. Your mission is clear: recover the seeds, reactivate the Lazarus Complex, and launch the last of humanity to the stars.
  
  But the world is not as empty as it seems. Machines still whisper old protocols, relics of the past still move with purpose, and your every step brings you closer to uncovering the meaning of your existence.
  
  NURTURE HUMANS   
  Care for and grow human seeds within the Lazarus Complex, managing crucial systems like incubation temperature, nutrient flow, and memory data integration. Unlock advanced biopods and synthetic caretakers to accelerate development and ensure successful revival. Discover emotional imprints and past memories encoded in each seed, piecing together lost human stories as you bring life back into the world.
  
  PROTECT HUMANS   
  Defend the Lazarus Complex from rogue machines and environmental threats. Build automated defenses, upgrade your mobile platform, and deploy countermeasures during storms and system breaches. Safeguard the vulnerable human seeds and ensure the sanctuary remains operational while under siege. Strategic choices in protection systems can determine the fate of the last generation of humans.
  
  LAUNCH ROCKETS INTO ORBIT   
  Restore and reactivate the ancient MOSES launch infrastructure to send reborn humans beyond the drowning world. Scavenge for launch codes, refine fuel, and rebuild navigation AI systems to ensure mission success. Each launch is a calculated risk—but a necessary one to preserve the species. Watch your nurtured humans ascend into orbit, carrying with them the hopes of a renewed humanity.

Un'avventura di azione e sopravvivenza in prima persona in cui navighi, recuperi risorse e ricostruisci in un mondo oceanico senza fine. Recupera la tecnologia perduta, crea sistemi vitali e assicura il futuro dell'umanità, prima che sia troppo tardi.
  
  Sei The Last Caretaker, una macchina solitaria riattivata dopo secoli di silenzio. La Terra è sommersa e le sue imponenti megastrutture arrugginiscono sotto un cielo infinito. I Caveau dei semi, contenenti gli ultimi semi umani in attesa di nascere, sono ancora intatti. La tua missione è chiara: recuperare i semi, riattivare il Lazarus Complex e inviare ciò che resta dell'umanità verso le stelle.
  
  Tuttavia, il mondo non è così vuoto come sembra. Le macchine sussurrano ancora antichi protocolli, reliquie del passato si muovono ancora con uno scopo, e ogni tuo passo ti avvicina alla scoperta del significato della tua esistenza.
  Esplora  Naviga attraverso un vasto mondo oceanico, esplorando i resti di una civiltà dimenticata. Dalle imponenti megastrutture ai fari lampeggianti, fino ai caveau di semi abbandonati e alle stazioni di rifornimento, ogni luogo custodisce conoscenze perdute, risorse essenziali e frammenti di un mistero in attesa di essere svelato.
  Crea  Recupera e ripristina la tecnologia antica, realizza aggiornamenti modulari e riattiva i sistemi vitali per ricostruire l'infrastruttura MOSES. Ogni innovazione avvicina l'umanità alla sopravvivenza, dal ripristino delle reti elettriche alla ricostruzione dei sistemi di lancio.
  Coltiva  Il Lazarus Complex è l'ultimo santuario dell'umanità. Monitora e ottimizza il delicato processo di crescita dei semi umani, bilanciando energia, nutrizione e ricostruzione della memoria. Ogni lancio verso le stelle porta l'umanità un passo più vicina a un futuro oltre l'oceano.
  Sopravvivi  L'oceano è meraviglioso, ma non è sicuro. Macchine ribelli, violente tempeste e risorse limitate mettono continuamente alla prova la tua missione. Adattati, potenzia e combatti per proteggere quel poco che resta.
  Scopri  Non sei umano, tuttavia il loro futuro è nelle tue mani. Cosa significa essere umano? La vita può rinascere grazie a mani sintetiche? Durante l'esplorazione, scoprirai gli ultimi giorni della Terra e la verità dietro la tua esistenza.

title: Minecraft Dungeons
description:
Minecraft Dungeons Ultimate Edition     
 
 Experience the complete story of Minecraft Dungeons from the beginning to the End. Grab the Ultimate Edition which includes the base game and all six DLCs: Jungle Awakens, Creeping Winter, Howling Peaks, Flames of the Nether, Hidden Depths, and Echoing Void–all at a lower price than purchasing the game and each DLC separately.
 
 Unlock special digital bonus content to become the ultimate hero! Download the Ultimate Edition today and receive digital artwork from each DLC as well as the entire game soundtrack featuring 200+ tracks. This offer is only available on Steam.
 
  Minecraft Dungeons Ultimate DLC Bundle  Experience the story beyond the base game with the Minecraft Dungeons: Ultimate DLC Bundle. You’ve played the main story, but now it’s time to see it through to the End! Fight countless mobs, explore dimension-hopping levels, and discover untold treasures as you complete the story of the Orb of Dominance. Grab the Ultimate DLC Bundle and get all six DLCs: Jungle Awakens, Creeping Winter, Howling Peaks, Flames of the Nether, Hidden Depths, and Echoing Void. By purchasing the bundle, you’ll get all six DLCs at a lower price than if you purchased them separately. Complete the story with the Ultimate DLC Bundle!
 
    
 
  About the Game Fight your way through an exciting action-adventure game, inspired by classic dungeon crawlers and set in the Minecraft universe! Brave the dungeons alone, or team up with friends! Up to four players can battle together through action-packed, treasure-stuffed, wildly varied levels – all in an epic quest to save the villagers and take down the evil Arch-Illager!  Power Up!  Unlock over 250 unique artifacts, gear, and enchantments to perform and survive devastating special attacks.
      Multiplayer!  Up to four players can team up and fight together in co-op mode.
      Options!  Personalize your character, then fight up-close and personal with melee swings, hang back with ranged attacks, or tank your way through swarms of mobs, shielded by heavy armour!
      Epicness!  Explore treasure-stuffed levels in a quest to take down the evil Arch-Illager!

localized_description.text:
《我的世界：地下城》终极版     
 
 由始至末体验《我的世界：地下城》的完整故事。快来获取终极版，其中包括游戏本体和所有的六个 DLC：丛林觉醒、惊悚寒冬、怒号山峰、下界烈焰、水下深渊以及回荡虚空，即可享受比单独购买游戏和各个 DLC 更低的价格。消灭大量生物，探索各个维度之间的关卡，寻找隐秘的宝藏，并在一路上体验奇厄教主和王权灵珠的故事。机会不容错过，快购买终极版游戏，展开一场完整的《我的世界：地下城》之旅吧！
 
 解锁特殊数字奖励内容，化身终极英雄！立即下载终极版，即可获得各个 DLC 的数字艺术作品，以及包含 200 多首曲目的游戏全配乐。此优惠仅在 Steam 上提供。
 
  《我的世界：地下城》终极 DLC 捆绑包  获取《我的世界：地下城》：终极 DLC 捆绑包，体验游戏本体之外的故事。您已经领略过主要的剧情了，但现在是时候坚持到底，直达末地了！消灭大量生物，探索各个维度之间的关卡，寻找隐秘的宝藏，并在一路上体验王权灵珠的故事。获取终极 DLC 捆绑包，享受所有的六个 DLC：丛林觉醒、惊悚寒冬、怒号山峰、下界烈焰、水下深渊以及回荡虚空。通过购买捆绑包，您将能够以低于单独购买的价格获取所有的六个 DLC。快来购买终极 DLC 捆绑包，完成这一故事吧！
 
    
 
  关于游戏 在这款以经典的地牢爬行者为灵感、以《我的世界》为背景的动作冒险游戏中杀出一条险象环生的血路！独自挑战地牢，或者和好友一起组队！至多四名玩家一起通关惊险刺激、宝藏多多、风格各异的关卡，而这一切都是为了一项史诗级的使命：拯救村民，击败邪恶的奇厄教主！  升级！  解锁超过 250 种独特神器、装备及附魔，发动或承受毁天灭地的特殊攻击。
      多人游戏！  至多四名玩家可在合作模式下一起组队战斗。
      选项！  个性化您的角色，用近战武器热血奋战、用远程攻击千里杀敌，或是在重型盔甲的保护下，碾过蜂拥而来的生物！
      史诗！  探索充满宝藏的关卡，击败邪恶的灾厄教主！

Minecraft Dungeons 終極版     
 
 完整體驗 Minecraft Dungeons 的故事，從開始直到「終界」。購買終極版將包括基礎遊戲和完整 6 個 DLC：覺醒叢林、驚悚寒冬、咆嘯山巔、地獄烈焰、隱密深淵和回聲虛空，價格比單獨購買遊戲和每一款 DLC 更划算。隨著奇厄教主和統御寶珠的故事，對抗大量生物、探索跨維度關卡並找出數不清的寶藏。這是體驗完整 Minecraft Dungeons 的大好機會，馬上選購！
 
 解鎖特殊數位獎勵內容，成為終極英雄！立即下載「終極版」，並從每款 DLC 以及共 200 多首曲目的完整遊戲原聲帶中，取得這些數位藝術作品。此優惠僅在 Steam 上提供。
 
  Minecraft Dungeons 終極 DLC 組合包  在 Minecraft Dungeons：終極 DLC 組合包中，體驗基礎遊戲以外的故事。你已經玩過了主線故事，現在前往終界的時候到了！一邊終結統御寶珠的故事，一邊對抗無數生物、探索跨維度關卡並找出數不清的寶藏。購買終極 DLC 組合包，並取得完整 6 個 DLC：覺醒叢林、驚悚寒冬、咆嘯山巔、地獄烈焰、隱密深淵和回聲虛空。購買組合包的價格，比個別購買遊戲和每一款 DLC 更划算。在終極 DLC 組合包完整體驗故事！
 
    
 
  關於此遊戲 在全新的動作冒險遊戲中全力奮戰，遊戲靈感來自經典的「深入地牢」，也是 Minecraft 宇宙中的新成員！獨自勇闖地牢，或與好友組隊挑戰！最多可由四名玩家在充滿動作元素、寶藏與廣泛的關卡中共同作戰 – 所有精彩內容都在史詩任務中，目標就是拯救村民，並擊倒邪惡的奇厄教主！  提升力量！ [/h2解鎖超過 250 種獨特道具與武器附魔，使用毀滅性的特殊攻擊。
      多人遊玩！  最多可由四名玩家組隊，在合作模式中攜手作戰。
      多種選擇！  個人化你的角色，然後用近戰揮舞進行近戰與個人攻擊、用範圍攻擊在後方輸出，或在重裝甲的掩護下，承受攻擊並突破大群生物！
      史詩！  探索充滿寶藏的關卡，消滅邪惡的奇厄教主！

Minecraft Dungeons Ultimate Edition     
 
 Experience the complete story of Minecraft Dungeons from the beginning to the End. Grab the Ultimate Edition which includes the base game and all six DLCs: Jungle Awakens, Creeping Winter, Howling Peaks, Flames of the Nether, Hidden Depths, and Echoing Void–all at a lower price than purchasing the game and each DLC separately.
 
 Unlock special digital bonus content to become the ultimate hero! Download the Ultimate Edition today and receive digital artwork from each DLC as well as the entire game soundtrack featuring 200+ tracks. This offer is only available on Steam.
 
  Minecraft Dungeons Ultimate DLC Bundle  Experience the story beyond the base game with the Minecraft Dungeons: Ultimate DLC Bundle. You’ve played the main story, but now it’s time to see it through to the End! Fight countless mobs, explore dimension-hopping levels, and discover untold treasures as you complete the story of the Orb of Dominance. Grab the Ultimate DLC Bundle and get all six DLCs: Jungle Awakens, Creeping Winter, Howling Peaks, Flames of the Nether, Hidden Depths, and Echoing Void. By purchasing the bundle, you’ll get all six DLCs at a lower price than if you purchased them separately. Complete the story with the Ultimate DLC Bundle!
 
    
 
  About the Game Fight your way through an exciting action-adventure game, inspired by classic dungeon crawlers and set in the Minecraft universe! Brave the dungeons alone, or team up with friends! Up to four players can battle together through action-packed, treasure-stuffed, wildly varied levels – all in an epic quest to save the villagers and take down the evil Arch-Illager!  Power Up!  Unlock over 250 unique artifacts, gear, and enchantments to perform and survive devastating special attacks.
      Multiplayer!  Up to four players can team up and fight together in co-op mode.
      Options!  Personalize your character, then fight up-close and personal with melee swings, hang back with ranged attacks, or tank your way through swarms of mobs, shielded by heavy armour!
      Epicness!  Explore treasure-stuffed levels in a quest to take down the evil Arch-Illager!

Edición definitiva de Minecraft Dungeons     
 
 Disfruta de la historia completa de Minecraft Dungeons de principio a fin. Hazte con la edición definitiva que incluye el juego base y los seis DLC (La jungla despierta, Invierno espeluznante, Las cumbres de los aullidos, Las llamas del Inframundo, Las profundidades ocultas y Vacío resonante) por un precio menor que comprando el juego y cada DLC por separado.
 
 ¡Desbloquea contenido digital especial y conviértete en el héroe definitivo! Descarga la edición definitiva hoy mismo y consigue ilustraciones digitales de cada DLC y la banda sonora de todo el juego (¡son más de 200 temas!). Esta oferta solo está disponible en Steam.
 
  Lote de DLC definitivo de Minecraft Dungeons  Disfruta de la historia más allá del juego base con el lote de DLC definitivo de Minecraft Dungeons. Has jugado a la historia principal, ¡así que es hora de llegar hasta el final! Enfréntate a incontables de criaturas, explora niveles en distintas dimensiones y encuentra tesoros increíbles a medida que completas la historia del orbe del dominio. Hazte con el lote de DLC definitivo y obtén los seis DLC: La jungla despierta, Invierno espeluznante, Las cumbres de los aullidos, Las llamas del Inframundo, Las profundidades ocultas y Vacío resonante. Al comprar el lote, obtendrás los seis DLC por un precio menor que comprándolos por separado. ¡Completa la historia con el lote de DLC definitivo!
 
    
 
  Acerca del juego ¡Ábrete camino luchando en un juego de aventura y acción emocionante inspirado en los juegos de mazmorras clásicos y ambientado en el universo de Minecraft! ¡Enfréntate a las mazmorras solo o con tus amigos! En estos variadísimos niveles repletos de acción y a rebosar de tesoros, pueden luchar juntos hasta cuatro jugadores. ¡Vivirás una aventura épica cuya misión será salvar a los aldeanos y acabar con el malvado Archimaldeano!  ¡Poténciate!   Desbloquea más de 250 artefactos, piezas de equipo y encantamientos únicos para realizar ataques especiales devastadores... ¡y sobrevivir a ellos!
      ¡Multijugador!  Es posible formar equipos de hasta cuatro jugadores para luchar juntos en el modo cooperativo.
      ¡Muchas opciones!   Personaliza tu personaje para luchar cuerpo a cuerpo con giros, atacar a distancia desde la retaguardia o lanzarte directamente a través de hordas de criaturas protegido con tu armadura pesada.
      ¡Épico!   Explora niveles repletos de tesoros con el objetivo de acabar con el malvado Archimaldeano.

Minecraft Dungeons édition Ultime     
 
 Découvrez l’histoire complète de Minecraft Dungeons, du début à la fin. Profitez de l’édition Ultime rassemblant le jeu de base et les six DLC : l'éveil de la jungle, l'hiver insidieux, Cimes hurlantes, Flammes du Nether, Les profondeurs cachées et Vide résonnant, le tout à un prix inférieur à l’achat du jeu et de chaque DLC séparément.
 
 Débloquez du contenu numérique bonus spécial pour devenir le héros ultime ! Téléchargez l’édition Ultime dès aujourd’hui pour recevoir des illustrations numériques de chaque DLC ainsi que toute la bande sonore du jeu avec plus de 200 pistes. Cette offre n’est disponible que sur Steam.
 
  Minecraft Dungeons Pack de DLC Ultime  Découvrez l’histoire au-delà du jeu de base avec Minecraft Dungeons : Pack de DLC Ultime. Vous avez exploré l’histoire principale, mais il est maintenant temps d’en découvrir la fin ! Combattez des créatures par dizaines, explorez des niveaux alternant entre plusieurs dimensions et découvrez des trésors incroyables en terminant l’histoire de l’orbe de domination. Profitez du Pack de DLC Ultime et obtenez les six DLC : l'éveil de la jungle, l'hiver insidieux, Cimes hurlantes, Flammes du Nether, Les profondeurs cachées et Vide résonnant. Avec ce pack, vous obtiendrez les six DLC à un prix inférieur à celui de l’achat individuel de chaque élément. Allez jusqu’au bout de l’histoire avec le pack de DLC Ultime !
 
    
 
  À propos du jeu Battez-vous dans un tout nouveau jeu d'action-aventure passionnant inspiré par les dungeon crawlers classiques et qui se déroule dans l'univers de Minecraft ! Parcourez les donjons en solo ou avec des amis ! Jusqu'à quatre joueurs peuvent coopérer à travers des niveaux extrêmement variés remplis d'action et de trésors, le tout dans une quête épique pour sauver les villageois et triompher du terrible Arch-Illageois !  Plus de puissance!   Déverrouillez plus de 250 artéfacts, objets et enchantements uniques pour effectuer et résister à des attaques spéciales dévastatrices.
      Multijoueur!  Jusqu'à quatre joueurs peuvent former une équipe et se battre ensemble en mode coop.
      Des options!   P
 ersonnalisez votre héros, puis sautez dans la mêlée avec des coups puissants ou restez à distance avec vos attaques, ou encore, jouez le tank au milieu des vagues de créatures, protégé par votre imposante armure!
      Épique!   Explorez des niveaux remplis de trésors dans une quête pour faire tomber le terrible Arch-Illageois!

Minecraft Dungeons Ultimate Edition     
 
 Erlebe die ganze Geschichte von Minecraft Dungeons vom Anfang bis zum Ende. Schnapp dir die Ultimate Edition mit dem Hauptspiel und allen sechs DLCs: Der Dschungel erwacht, Schleichender Winter, Heulende Gipfel, Flammen des Nether, Versteckte Tiefen und Hallende Leere. Und das Beste daran? Die Ultimate Edition ist günstiger, als das Spiel und die DLCs separat zu kaufen.
 
 Schalte spezielle digitale Bonusinhalte frei, um zum ultimativen Helden zu werden! Lade dir noch heute die Ultimate Edition runter und erhalte digitale Illustrationen aus jedem DLC sowie den kompletten Soundtrack des Spiels mit über 200 Songs. Dieses Angebot ist nur auf Steam verfügbar.
 
  Minecraft Dungeons Ultimate DLC Bundle  Erlebe mit dem Minecraft Dungeons: Ultimate DLC Bundle die Geschichte nach dem Hauptspiel. Du hast die Hauptgeschichte gespielt, aber jetzt wird es Zeit für das Ende! Kämpfe gegen Horden von Kreaturen, erkunde Level, springe in verschiedene Dimensionen, entdecke ungeahnte Schätze und schließe die Geschichte um die Kugel der Dominanz ab. Schnapp dir das Ultimate DLC Bundle mit allen sechs DLCs: Der Dschungel erwacht, Schleichender Winter, Heulende Gipfel, Flammen des Nether, Versteckte Tiefen und Hallende Leere. Mit diesem Bundle kosten dich die sechs DLCs weniger, als wenn du sie dir separat kaufst. Schließe die Geschichte mit dem Ultimate DLC Bundle ab!
 
    
 
  Infos zum Spiel Kämpfe dich durch ein aufregendes Action-Adventure-Spiel, das von klassischen Dungeon-Crawlern inspiriert wurde und im Minecraft-Universum angesiedelt ist! Wage dich allein in den Dungeon oder verbünde dich mit Freunden! Bis zu vier Spieler können sich gemeinsam durch actionreiche, mit Schätzen gefüllte und abwechslungsreiche Level kämpfen – und das alles in einem epischen Abenteuer, um die Dorfbewohner zu retten und den bösen Erz-Illager zu bezwingen!!  Rüste richtig auf!   Schalte mehr als 250 einzigartige Artefakte, Ausrüstungsteile und Verzauberungen zum Ausführen und Überleben von vernichtenden Angriffen frei.
      Mehrspielermodus!   Bis zu vier Spieler können sich zusammenschließen und gemeinsam kämpfen.
      Optionen!   Gestalte deinen Charakter individuell und bahne dir dann im Nahkampf, im Fernkampf oder schwer gerüstet und mit Schild deinen Weg durch die Horden von Kreaturen!
      Einfach episch!  Erkunde bis zum Rand mit Schätzen vollgestopfte Level auf deiner Mission, den bösen Erz-Illager in die Knie zu zwingen!

Minecraft Dungeons Edição Ultimate     [/imgg
 Viva a história completa de Minecraft Dungeons do começo ao fim — ou melhor, End! Aproveite a Edição Ultimate, que inclui o jogo base e todos os seis DLCs: Despertar da Selva, Inverno Arrepiante, Picos Uivantes, Chamas do Nether, As Profundezas Ocultas e Vazio Ecoante — tudo a um preço mais baixo do que comprar o jogo e os DLCs separadamente.
 
 Desbloqueia conteúdo de bónus digital especial para te tornares no(a) real herói(na)! Transfere hoje a Edição Ultimate e recebe obras de arte digitais de cada DLC, bem como toda a banda sonora do jogo com mais de 200 faixas. Esta oferta só está disponível no Steam.
 
  Minecraft Dungeons Pacote DLC Ultimate  Viva a história além do jogo base com o Minecraft Dungeons: Pacote DLC Ultimate. Você jogou a história principal, mas agora é hora de vivenciá-la do começo ao fim — ou melhor, End! Combata dezenas de criaturas, explore diferentes dimensões e encontre incontáveis tesouros enquanto completa a história do Orbe da Dominância. Aproveite o Pacote DLC Ultimate e obtenha todos os seis DLCs: Despertar da Selva, Inverno Arrepiante, Picos Uivantes, Chamas do Nether, As Profundezas Ocultas e Vazio Ecoante — tudo a um preço mais baixo do que comprar os DLCs separadamente. Conclua a história com o Pacote DLC Ultimate!
 
    
 
  Acerca do jogo Luta neste entusiasmante novo jogo de aventura, inspirado por rastejantes de masmorras clássicos e localizado no universo do Minecraft! Aventura-te pelas masmorras sozinho(a) ou junta-te a amigo(a)s! Podem jogar até quatro amigo(a)s juntos em diversos níveis cheios de ação, tesouros e bem selvagens – toda uma missão épica para salvar os aldeões e derrotar o Arce-Illager!  Melhora!   Desbloqueia mais de 250 artefactos, equipamento e encantamentos para executar e sobreviver a devastadores ataques especiais.
      Multijogador!   Até quatro jogadores podem juntar-se e lutar em conjunto no modo de cooperação.
      Opções!   Personaliza a tua personagem e luta de perto com multidões oscilantes, seguidos de ataques à distância ou atravessa montões de criaturas, protegidos por armaduras pesadas!
      Épico!   Explora níveis repletos de tesouros numa missão para derrotar o Arce-Illager!

Minecraft Dungeons Ultimate Edition     
 
 果ての世界へと向かう Minecraft Dungeons の完全なる物語へようこそ! アルティメット エディションを手に入れて、ゲーム本編とともに Jungle Awakens (ジャングルの目覚め)、Creeping Winter (忍び寄る冬)、Howling Peaks (荒れ狂う頂)、Flames of the Nether (ネザーの炎)、Hidden Depths (未知なる深海)、Echoing Void (残響する奈落) の 6 つの DLC を思う存分楽しみましょう! バンドルで購入すると、6 つの DLC を単体で購入するよりもお得にお楽しみいただけます
 
 究極のヒーローになろう! これまでになくスペシャルなデジタル ボーナス コンテンツを手に入れるチャンス!「Minecraft Dungeons アルティメット エディション」を今すぐダウンロードして、各 DLC のデジタル アートワークや、200 以上の曲を収録したフル サウンドトラックを楽しもう。このオファーは Steam でのみご利用いただけます。
 
  Minecraft Dungeons Ultimate DLC バンドル  Minecraft Dungeons: アルティメット DLC バンドルで本編を超えた世界を体験! Minecraft Dungeons のメイン ストーリーの先に待つものとは... そう、果ての世界です! 無数のモブに立ち向かい、さまざまな次元を行き来しながら続く冒険の旅。支配のオーブの物語の果てに、かつてない宝物との出会いが待っています。アルティメット DLC バンドルを手に入れて、Jungle Awakens (ジャングルの目覚め)、Creeping Winter (忍び寄る冬)、Howling Peaks (荒れ狂う頂)、Flames of the Nether (ネザーの炎)、Hidden Depths (未知なる深海)、Echoing Void (残響する奈落) の 6 つの DLC を思う存分楽しみましょう! バンドルで購入すると、6 つの DLC を単体で購入するよりもお得にお楽しみいただけます。アルティメット DLC バンドルで物語の最終章へいざ出発!
 
    
 
  ゲームについて クラシックなダンジョンクローラーに着想を得た、Minecraft の世界を舞台にした新作アクションアドベンチャーが登場。友だちといっしょに戦えることに加え、勇敢にひとりでダンジョンへ立ち向かうことももちろん可能。最大 4 人のプレイヤーで敵に挑み、宝を手に入れ、さまざまなステージをクリアしよう。村人たちを守り、邪悪な村人の王を倒すための壮大なクエストに挑戦!  パワーアップ!   数多くのユニークなアイテムや武器のエンチャントを解除して、超強力な必殺技を繰り出しましょう。
      マルチプレイヤー!   協力プレイ モードでは、最大 4 人のプレイヤーとチームを組み、力を合わせて戦えます。
      カスタマイズ!   キャラクターを自分好みにカスタマイズしましょう。近接武器で一対一の接近戦を仕掛けるか、遠距離武器で遠くの敵を狙うか、それとも重厚な鎧を装備してモブの大群に突っ込むか... 選択はあなた次第!
      壮大なスケール!  お宝でいっぱいのクエストのステージを攻略しながら、邪悪な村人の王を倒しましょう!

Minecraft Dungeons Ultimate Edition     
 
 Experience the complete story of Minecraft Dungeons from the beginning to the End. Grab the Ultimate Edition which includes the base game and all six DLCs: Jungle Awakens, Creeping Winter, Howling Peaks, Flames of the Nether, Hidden Depths, and Echoing Void–all at a lower price than purchasing the game and each DLC separately.
 
 Unlock special digital bonus content to become the ultimate hero! Download the Ultimate Edition today and receive digital artwork from each DLC as well as the entire game soundtrack featuring 200+ tracks. This offer is only available on Steam.
 
  Minecraft Dungeons Ultimate DLC Bundle  Experience the story beyond the base game with the Minecraft Dungeons: Ultimate DLC Bundle. You’ve played the main story, but now it’s time to see it through to the End! Fight countless mobs, explore dimension-hopping levels, and discover untold treasures as you complete the story of the Orb of Dominance. Grab the Ultimate DLC Bundle and get all six DLCs: Jungle Awakens, Creeping Winter, Howling Peaks, Flames of the Nether, Hidden Depths, and Echoing Void. By purchasing the bundle, you’ll get all six DLCs at a lower price than if you purchased them separately. Complete the story with the Ultimate DLC Bundle!
 
    
 
  About the Game Fight your way through an exciting action-adventure game, inspired by classic dungeon crawlers and set in the Minecraft universe! Brave the dungeons alone, or team up with friends! Up to four players can battle together through action-packed, treasure-stuffed, wildly varied levels – all in an epic quest to save the villagers and take down the evil Arch-Illager!  Power Up!  Unlock over 250 unique artifacts, gear, and enchantments to perform and survive devastating special attacks.
      Multiplayer!  Up to four players can team up and fight together in co-op mode.
      Options!  Personalize your character, then fight up-close and personal with melee swings, hang back with ranged attacks, or tank your way through swarms of mobs, shielded by heavy armour!
      Epicness!  Explore treasure-stuffed levels in a quest to take down the evil Arch-Illager!

Minecraft Dungeons Ultimate Edition  Spil den komplette historie i Minecraft Dungeons fra begyndelsen til Enden. Når du køber Ultimate Edition, får du både basisspillet og alle seks DLC'er: Junglen vågner, Snigende vinter, Hylende tinder, Nethers flammer, Skjulte dybder og Ekko i tomrummet til en lavere pris, end hvis du køber dem hver for sig.
 
    
 
  Minecraft Dungeons Ultimativt DLC-bundle  Tag historien ud over basisspillet med det ultimative DLC-bundle til Minecraft Dungeons. Du har spillet hovedhistorien, men nu er det tid til at gå hele vejen til Enden! Kæmp mod utallige mobs, gå på opdagelse i forskellige dimensioner, og find ufattelige skatte på din vej mod afslutningen af historien om Dominanskuglen. Med det ultimative DLC-bundle får du alle seks DLC'er: Junglen vågner, Snigende vinter, Hylende tinder, Nethers flammer, Skjulte dybder og Ekko i tomrummet. Ved at købe bundlet får du alle seks DLC'er til en lavere pris, end hvis du køber dem hver for sig. Gennemfør historien med det ultimative DLC-bundle!
 
    
 
  Om spillet Kast dig ud i et helt nyt action- og eventyrspil, der er inspireret af klassiske dungeon crawlere og foregår i Minecraft-universet! Træng ind i hulesystemerne alene, eller slå dig sammen med dine venner! Op til fire spillere kan kæmpe sig igennem de hektiske og vanvittigt varierede baner samtidig – på en episk mission for at redde landsbyboerne fra den onde ærke-udstødte og fylde lommerne med skatte!  Power Up!   Lås op for dusinvis af unikke genstande og magiske våben til altødelæggende specialangreb.
      Multiplayer!   Op til fire spillere kan spille sammen i co-op.
      Muligheder!   Tilpas din karakter, og gå i dødbringende nærkamp, nedlæg fjender på afstand, eller mos dig igennem horder af monstre i dit tungeste panser!
      Hæder og ære!  Kæmp dig igennem baner fyldt med skatte for at besejre den onde ærke-udstødte!

Minecraft Dungeons edizione definitiva     
 
 Scopri la storia completa di Minecraft Dungeons, dall'inizio fino all'End. Scarica l'edizione definitiva, che include il gioco base e tutti e sei i DLC: Risveglio della giungla, Inverno opprimente, Picchi urlanti, Fiamme del Nether, Le profondità dello schermo e Vuoto echeggiante, il tutto a un prezzo inferiore rispetto all'acquisto separato del gioco e di ogni DLC.
 
 Sblocca speciali contenuti bonus digitali per diventare l'eroe definitivo! Scarica l'Edizione definitiva oggi stesso e ricevi la copertina digitale di ogni DLC e l'intera colonna sonora del gioco con oltre 200 brani. L'offerta è disponibile solo su Steam.
 
  Minecraft Dungeons Bundle DLC definitivo  Scopri la storia oltre il gioco base con il Bundle Minecraft Dungeons: DLC definitivo. Hai giocato alla storia principale, ma ora è il momento di vederla fino all'End! Combatti innumerevoli creature, esplora i livelli di salto di dimensione e scopri tesori indicibili mentre completi la storia della Sfera del Predominio. Scarica il Bundle DLC definitivo e ottieni tutti e sei i DLC: Risveglio della giungla, Inverno opprimente, Picchi urlanti, Fiamme del Nether, Le profondità dello schermo e Vuoto echeggiante. Acquistando il bundle otterrai tutti e sei i DLC a un prezzo inferiore rispetto all'acquisto separato di ogni DLC. Completa la storia con il Bundle DLC definitivo!
 
    
 
  Informazioni sul gioco Fatti strada combattendo in una entusiasmante avventura ispirata ai classici dungeon crawler e ambientata nell'universo di Minecraft! Affronta i dungeon da solo o fai squadra con i tuoi amici! Possono giocare insieme fino a quattro persone, superando livelli estremamente diversi, ricchi di azione e di tesori, per portare a termine un'epica missione: salvare gli abitanti del villaggio e sconfiggere il malvagio Arci-abitore!  Potenziamenti!  Sblocca più di 250 manufatti, equipaggiamenti e incantesimi unici per eseguire attacchi speciali devastanti e sopravvivere a quelli ricevuti.
      Multigiocatore!  Fino a quattro giocatori possono fare squadra per combattere insieme in modalità co-op.
      Opzioni!   Personalizza il tuo personaggio e scendi in campo con colpi corpo a corpo, resta nelle retrovie con gli attacchi a distanza oppure gettati nella mischia contro un'orda di creature con un'armatura pesante!
      Avventure epiche!   Esplora livelli pieni di tesori portando a termine una missione: sconfiggere l'Arci-abitore!

title: Scrap Mechanic
description:
PLEASE NOTE: We’re still hard at work on Scrap Mechanic! New content is being added and optimizations being made regularly. Get started right away in Survival Mode, Creative Mode and Challenge Mode! Please watch the latest Scrap Mechanic trailers to see the game’s latest state.  Tool up and enter the creative paradise of Scrap Mechanic! Build fantastic machines, go on adventures with your friends and defend against evil Farmerbots in this imaginative multiplayer survival sandbox. With Scrap Mechanic’s powerful creation tools you can engineer your own adventures!  
 
 ‘Be a robot mechanic’, they said. ‘Easy money’, they said. We’re pretty sure the job description didn’t mention crash landing on a far away planet, with thousands of crazed worker robots out for blood! You’re stranded on a faraway agriculture planet where the Farmbots working the fields have gone haywire. With your tool belt tightly fastened, there’s only one way to survive: using your quick thinking, creativity and a wily knack of turning your surroundings to your advantage!
 
  Survival Mode!  
 In Survival Mode mechanics explore a dynamically generated open-world environment filled with enemies, treasure and dangerous robots! Team up with friends and build bases to protect yourself and your valuables. The most creative will survive!
 
  Challenge Mode!  
 Put your imagination to the test in the Master Mechanic Trials, an amazing roster of 40 fun and testing challenges which every wannabe mechanic should master before embarking on the wide-open world. Plus create your own challenges and share them with friends!
 
  Creative Mode! 
 Choose from over 400+ building parts and create a transforming vehicle, a walking house or anything you and your friends can imagine! Scrap Mechanic mod support offers an easy way to download over 1000+ new player made building parts for your creations! 
 
 
 For all the latest news, follow us on:
 Twitter
 Facebook
 
 
 For more info:

Build fantastic machines, go on adventures with your friends and defend against evil Farmerbots in this imaginative multiplayer survival sandbox. With Scrap Mechanic’s powerful creation tools you can engineer your own adventures!  
 
 ‘Be a robot mechanic’, they said. ‘Easy money’, they said. We’re pretty sure the job description didn’t mention crash landing on a far away planet, with thousands of crazed worker robots out for blood! You’re stranded on a faraway agriculture planet where the Farmbots working the fields have gone haywire. With your tool belt tightly fastened, there’s only one way to survive: using your quick thinking, creativity and a wily knack of turning your surroundings to your advantage!
 
  Survival Mode!  
 In Survival Mode mechanics explore a dynamically generated open-world environment filled with enemies, treasure and dangerous robots! Team up with friends and build bases to protect yourself and your valuables. The most creative will survive!
 
  Challenge Mode!  
 Put your imagination to the test in the Master Mechanic Trials, an amazing roster of 40 fun and testing challenges which every wannabe mechanic should master before embarking on the wide-open world. Plus create your own challenges and share them with friends!
 
  Creative Mode! 
 Choose from over 400+ building parts and create a transforming vehicle, a walking house or anything you and your friends can imagine! Scrap Mechanic mod support offers an easy way to download over 1000+ new player made building parts for your creations! 
 
 
 For all the latest news, follow us on:
 Twitter
 Facebook

title: Shenzhen I/O
description:
"BUILD CIRCUITS. WRITE CODE. RTFM.

- Build circuits using a variety of components from different manufacturers, like microcontrollers, memory, and logic gates.
- Write code in a compact and powerful assembly language where every instruction can be conditionally executed.
- Read the included manual, which includes over 30 pages of original datasheets, reference guides, and technical diagrams.
- Get to know the colorful cast of characters at your new employer, 深圳龙腾科技有限公司 (Shenzhen Longteng Electronics Co., Ltd.), located in the electronics capital of the world.
- Get creative! Design and test your own games and devices in the sandbox.
- Engineering is hard! Take a break and play a brand-new twist on solitaire."

title: Elden Ring
description:
Elden Ring is an action RPG developed by FromSoftware and published by Bandai Namco Entertainment, released in February 2022. Directed by Hidetaka Miyazaki, with world-building contributions from novelist George R. R. Martin, the game features an expansive open world called the Lands Between. Players assume the role of a customisable character known as the Tarnished, who must explore this world, battle formidable enemies, and seek to restore the Elden Ring to become the Elden Lord.

The game builds on the challenging gameplay mechanics familiar from the Dark Souls series but introduces a more open-ended structure with vast exploration, dynamic weather, and a day-night cycle. It offers deep lore, complex characters, and an interconnected world filled with secrets, dungeons, and powerful bosses.

Elden Ring takes place in the Lands Between, a fictional realm over which several demigods rule. It was previously ruled over by the immortal Queen Marika, who acted as keeper of the Elden Ring, a powerful force that manifested itself as the physical concept of order. When Marika shattered the Elden Ring and disappeared, her demigod children began fighting over pieces of the Ring in an event called The Shattering. Each demigod has a shard of the Ring called a Great Rune, which corrupts them with power. In the game, the player character is a Tarnished, one of a group of exiles from the Lands Between who are summoned back after the Shattering. The player must traverse the realm to repair the Elden Ring and become the Elden Lord.
